case_title: THE ADWORKS FOR SAN FRANCISCO VS BALBOA PIZZA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $422.25 FILED BY THE ADWORKS FOR SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BALBOA PIZZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $100.00 FILED BY BALBOA PIZZA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT THE ADWORKS FOR SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF THE ADWORKS FOR SAN FRANCISCO

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE ADWORKS FOR SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BALBOA PIZZA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BALBOA PIZZA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT THE ADWORKS FOR SAN FRANCISCO $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
